subject: [PATCH v2 5/5] devconfig: add some extra packages to the kdev tools

2026-06-18.patch_summary: This patch adds extra packages to the kdev tools installation process, specifically for Red Hat configurations. The added packages include strace, lsof, git, wireshark-cli, rsync, and time, which are useful tools for development and debugging purposes. This change only affects Red Hat distributions as the package names for other distros were unknown at the time of submission.
